title: NASA Parker Solar Probe
description: A NASA source card about Parker Solar Probe and close-up study of the Sun.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA Parker Solar Probe resources explain a mission designed to travel through the Sun outer atmosphere and study solar wind, magnetic fields, and energetic particles.
Use this source for reading about engineering under extreme conditions and how scientists gather evidence close to a star.
NASA materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some images, partner resources, insignia, and logos have separate usage rules. Check item-level rights.
